trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s 2025 guide recommends the DOP‑protected traditional balsamic vinegars from Modena and Reggio Emilia as top choices, citing their authentic production methods, long aging, and quality guarantees.
